# Paraguay Investor Pass

> The complete, accurate guide to Paraguay residency by investment — the "Investor Pass" established by Resolution N° 0283/2026 (Ministry of Industry and Commerce, signed 21 April 2026). A qualifying investment grants direct permanent residency, with a later path to citizenship by naturalisation (not citizenship by investment).

Key facts:
- Permanent residency is granted directly, bypassing the usual two-year temporary stage.
- The Foreign Investor Certificate (CIE) is issued by the MIC within 5 business days of a complete application; permanent residency is a separate, later step at the migration authority.
- Citizenship is by naturalisation after 3 years of permanent residence (subject to language, civics and physical-presence requirements) — it is NOT granted by investment.
- Paraguay uses a territorial tax system (foreign-source income generally untaxed) with flat 10% rates; reached investment grade with Moody's (Baa3, 2024) and S&P (BBB-, 2025).

Investment routes:
- Real estate — from USD 200,000: /real-estate/
- Approved tourism projects — from USD 150,000: /tourism/
- SUACE company formation — from USD 70,000: /suace/
- Film / audiovisual contribution — from ~USD 40,000 (separate INAP pathway): /film/

Provider: Lincoln Global Partners. Informational only; not legal or tax advice.
